accurate.why: All claims are consistent with the bill text and accurate real-world context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated content; all references and dates match.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose is terminating the national emergency declared via Proclamation 9994.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies section 202 of the National Emergencies Act as the authority used.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this bill.

effective_dates.why: Notes the approval date of April 10, 2023.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the sole operative provision—termination of the emergency.

concise.why: Somewhat verbose for a one-clause resolution; restates dates and details unnecessarily.

correct_entities.why: All entity and statutory references are correct.

correct_figures.why: All cited figures and dates match the bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
